Welcome to the WhatDoYouMeme Staking Platform

Introduction

The WhatDoYouMeme Staking Platform is a refined ecosystem where token holders can confidently stake their WDYM tokens into our staking pool. In return, they receive a proportional distribution of BUSD rewards from the reward staking pool over the committed period.

Getting Started

To commence your staking journey, ensure you are in possession of WDYM tokens. Choose the desired lock-in period, input the quantity of tokens for staking, and if you are a first-time participant, or if your allowance falls beneath the threshold of the input amount, click the 'Approve Allowance' button. Once this step is complete, you can finalize your staking by pressing the 'Stake' button. Multiple staking instances are permissible. For example, should you decide to stake an additional 100 WDYM tokens for 90 days, 15 days after your initial staking, you will possess two stakes each holding 100 WDYM tokens for 90 days, but with differing timelines. The rewards distribution would be equivalent to a one-time staking of 200 WDYM tokens.

Innovative Rewards Distribution

Our unique selling proposition lies within the intricate mechanics of our rewards distribution system. Although the mathematical backbone of the system is complex, a simplified explanation follows: Let's assume three users each stake one WDYM token, with varying staking periods - 90 days, 180 days, and 360 days. The rewards are allocated based on the duration of the stake and the total amount of tokens staked for each specific stake type. The ratios of stake rewards are as follows:
  • Stake TypeID 1: 100 = 1x
  • Stake TypeID 2: 150 = 1.5x
  • Stake TypeID 3: 300 = 3x
Any remaining BUSD from the initial 1000 BUSD (for example, 455.55 BUSD) is reintegrated into the system via the 'depositstuckedbnb' function. This ensures a precise and accurate distribution of rewards to stakers by checking each staker's total excluded and total realized amounts.

Emergency Unstake Functionality

Understanding the unexpected circumstances users might face, we offer the functionality of unstaking your tokens before the agreed period. However, this attracts a penalty of 10% of the total staked tokens for the respective stakeId. For instance, an unstake of 100 WDYM tokens before the completion of 90 days will return 90 WDYM tokens to you, with 10 WDYM tokens incinerated.

Security Assurance

To guarantee unassailable security, the contract has been meticulously developed by Revoluzion and undergone rigorous auditing by various internal parties. The contract includes safeguard measures like a maximum penalty restriction of 20%, a stipulation that only the stakeId owner can execute emergency withdrawals, and the prevention of rescue tokens from accessing any staked tokens. We maintain a comprehensive tracker for all transactions, thereby ensuring utmost safety.

Frequently Asked Questions

Q: How can I claim my rewards? Is it required to claim for each stakeID?
A: You can claim your rewards via the DApp. It is not necessary to claim for each stakeID; you can claim all rewards simultaneously.

Q: Will my rewards vanish if I unstake without prior claim?
A: No, any available rewards will be automatically claimed and transferred to your wallet during the unstaking process.

Q: What is the token quantity limit for staking?
A: There are no specific minimum or maximum constraints for staking.

Q: Will my rewards be lost if I don't claim from the initial pool deposited?
A: No, your rewards continue to accumulate for each pool and can be claimed at your convenience.

Q: I have approved the allowance for the contract, but nothing happens. What should I do?
A: Ensure that you have an adequate amount of WDYM tokens in your wallet to match the input amount you specified.

Q: Is it possible to stake multiple times?
A: Absolutely, you can perform multiple staking instances as per your preference, each with its unique timeline.

Q: Can I stake the same stake typeID multiple times, e.g., four stakes for 90 days?
A: Yes, each stakeID is unique, and you can stake as frequently as desired, providing users with immense flexibility.

Q: Can I stake for 90 days, 180 days, and 365 days simultaneously?
A: Indeed, you can. For instance, with 100 WDYM tokens, you could choose to stake 50 WDYM tokens for 90 days, 25 WDYM tokens for 180 days, and 25 WDYM tokens for 365 days. The staking amount is entirely at your discretion.

Q: So when do i receive my rewards? At the end of the staking period?
A: No, you will receive your rewards as soon a deposit is done into the pool. The rewards are distributed proportionally to the stakers based on the stake typeID and the total amount of tokens staked for each specific stake type.

Q: Can I contribute to the pool by depositing BNB or BUSD from the DApp?
A: Yes, anyone can deposit BUSD or BNB into the pool. However, the rewards are exclusively distributed to the stakers.

Q: I lost access to my wallet, can you assist me in unstaking my tokens?
A: Unfortunately, no. It is crucial to ensure the security and safety of all users, meaning even the contract owner cannot retrieve tokens for you. You would need to regain access to your wallet to unstake your tokens.

Q: Is it possible for me to execute a partial emergency withdrawal from my stakeID? Additionally, would the 10% fee apply to the total stakeID amount or just to the portion that I withdraw in an emergency?
A: Absolutely, it is feasible to execute a partial emergency withdrawal from your stakeID. As for the associated charges, please note that the 10% penalty would only apply to the portion of funds that you withdraw during the emergency withdrawal process, not the total stakeID amount.

Q: I understand that a 10% penalty fee is applied to the amount I withdraw in an emergency withdrawal situation. Could you provide clarity on the destination of this penalty fee and its subsequent utilization?
A: Absolutely. The incurred penalty fee is transferred to a designated penalty wallet. From there, it is strategically allocated: 4% is directed towards development efforts, which allows us to continually enhance our services and platform; the remaining 6% is transferred to a dEAd address, also known as a burn address, effectively reducing the circulating supply of the token.
